meaning: n.容量,生产量,容量,智能,才能,能力,接受力,地位
examples: Human beings have an infinite capacity for self-deception.
The school is filled to capacity.
He acted in an advisory capacity only.
But with only 2 million bpd of spare capacity left, this cushion is wearing thin.
These satellites will add the capacity for both 1500 local HD channels and 150 national HD channels.
